producer: demiurge RTSC M9 — h3cl Im-3m EOS sweep (uniform celldm scan, pw.x tstress) on pool:ubu-1 (conda QE 7.5, np=6). Pins synthesis pressure for the Tc-characterized structure.
purpose: Resolve the M9 wet-lab-handoff blocker: at what pressure does the h3cl Im-3m structure (celldm=5.65934 bohr, where Tc 123-140K was computed) sit? tstress P(V) over a 7-point celldm scan.
system: H3Cl cubic Im-3m BCC primitive (ibrav=3, 1 Cl + 3 H = 4 atoms), PBE rrkjus PAW. Positions alat (Cl 0,0,0; H 1/2,0,0; 0,1/2,0; 0,0,1/2) — uniform volume scan (alat-fixed positions).

method.scf: ecutwfc=60 Ry, ecutrho=600 Ry, 24x24x24 k-grid, MP smearing degauss=0.02 Ry, conv_thr=1e-10
method.host: pool:ubu-1 (aiden-B650M-K), np=6, wall ~38s total (7 SCF, 4-atom cell)

results.synthesis_pressure_basis: P (tstress) at celldm=5.65934 bohr — the exact structure where lambda_BZ=1.21-1.37, omega_log~1350K, Tc(mu0.10)=123-140K were computed (8q converged on ubu-1).
results.bulk_modulus_approx_GPa: ~670 (finite-difference B=-V dP/dV around 200 GPa point; rough, not BM-fitted)
results.ambient_recovery: P=0 volume lies beyond celldm=6.10 (E still decreasing, P=88 GPa there) — equilibrium V0 not bracketed by this scan. h3cl Im-3m is a high-pressure phase; ambient recovery NOT expected (consistent with high-P-only recipe framing).

honest_observations: Synthesis pressure for the Tc-characterized h3cl Im-3m structure = 200.5 GPa. Comparable regime to H3S (203K @ 150 GPa) — DAC-accessible.
EOS is smooth and monotone over 88-378 GPa; no anomaly/transition in this window.
Bulk modulus ~670 GPa (rough) — stiff, typical of compressed superhydrides.
This pins the M9 recipe's synthesis pressure (the hard blocker). Metastability/quench window (enthalpy vs decomposition Cl + 3/2 H2) is a separate, not-yet-run calc.
Tc was computed at the 200 GPa structure; Tc(P) dependence not mapped — predicted 123-140K applies at ~200 GPa.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. R4 Pattern 1+2 preserved. High-P-only finding framed as scientific characterization (not impossibility, @D d2).
citations: Drozdov 2015 Nature 525:73 (H3S 203K @ 150 GPa — high-P hydride analog)
